query:
CREATE TABLE `crewNotes` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`jobId` int NOT NULL,
	`crewMemberId` int,
	`authorName` varchar(255),
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`credentials` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `crewNotes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `crewNotes_jobId_jobs_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`jobId`) REFERENCES `jobs`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action,
	CONSTRAINT `crewNotes_crewMemberId_crewMembers_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`crewMemberId`) REFERENCES `crewMembers`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action
)

	`jobId` int NOT NULL,
	`crewMemberId` int,
	`authorName` varchar(255),
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`credentials` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `crewNotes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `crewNotes_jobId_jobs_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`jobId`) REFERENCES `jobs`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action,
	CONSTRAINT `crewNotes_crewMemberId_crewMembers_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`crewMemberId`) REFERENCES `crewMembers`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action
)
